summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LGSS SCUM Server Manager Iteration 4. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new features: splash screen with SCUM Ranger image + road + speed streaks, rebranded top bar with 'LEGENDARY GAMING / SCUM SERVER MANAGER', START ALL button, UPDATE SERVERS button, MANAGER UPDATE button with pulse animation when update available, per-server Update (SteamCMD) button, field tooltips in EN/TR, and settings preservation during update cycle.
critical_code_review_comments: Server update is SIMULATED (status toggle Updating→Stopped) - real SteamCMD call is in Electron main process as documented
Manager update apply-update endpoint is a no-op in web preview - real auto-updater + relaunch is Electron only
Schema correctly removed: advanced_virtualization category, scum.MasterServerIsLocalTest from essentials_performance, scum.SettingsVersion from essentials_wipe
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Tests use POST /api/setup/reset to clear state. POST /api/app/release with {version:'1.0.1'} to trigger manager update available state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features working. New endpoints: POST /servers/{id}/update (status→Updating, settings preserved), POST /servers/{id}/update/complete (status→Stopped), GET /app/version (current/latest/update_available/notes), POST /app/release (publish new version), POST /app/apply-update (no-op in web). Frontend data-testids: splash-screen, start-all-btn, update-all-servers-btn, manager-update-btn, server-update-button. Manager update button has 'manager-update-pulse' class when appVersion.update_available=true. Tooltips work via InfoTip component with hover. 60+ field tooltips in fieldMeta.js covering skills, damage, respawn, economy, vehicles, cargo, bunkers, encounters, graphics.

backend: POST /api/servers/{id}/update - returns status='Updating', settings NOT modified
POST /api/app/release - updates latest version, makes update_available=true
Schema no longer contains advanced_virtualization category
Settings preserved through full update→complete cycle
frontend: Splash screen (data-testid='splash-screen') with SCUM Ranger img, road animation, speed streaks, boot log
Top bar brand: 'LEGENDARY GAMING' + 'SCUM SERVER MANAGER'
START ALL button (data-testid='start-all-btn') - iterates stopped servers calling POST /servers/{id}/start
UPDATE SERVERS button (data-testid='update-all-servers-btn') - iterates all servers calling POST /servers/{id}/update
MANAGER UPDATE button (data-testid='manager-update-btn') - has 'manager-update-pulse' class when update available
MANAGER UPDATE click calls /api/app/apply-update, shows toast 'Update applied. Manager restarting...'
Field tooltips: hover on Info icon shows description (EN: 'Displayed name in the public server browser...')
Turkish tooltips: 'Sunucu tarayıcısında görünen ad. En fazla 50 karakter önerilir.'
New skill fields visible: Archery, Aviation, Awareness, Brawling, etc. (21 skills in SKILL MULTIPLIERS panel)
New vehicle physics fields: Fuel Drain Mult, Battery Drain (Engine/Devices/Idle), Alternator/Dynamo Charge
Quest fields: Quest Cycle Duration, Max Simultaneous/Trader visible in ECONOMY > QUESTS panel

mocked_apis.note: Server update is simulated (status toggle only). Manager update apply-update is no-op in web preview.
list: /servers/{id}/update - simulated status toggle, real SteamCMD in Electron
/app/apply-update - no-op in web, real auto-updater in Electron
